---
title: "PrivCo"
page-layout: article
---

# PrivCo

## Description

Business and financial database focused on major private companies, including venture-backed, family-owned, and private-equity-owned firms. Supports private company and market research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Market Research
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Market Research

## Access notes

Requires users to sign up for an account using a Yale email address.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?URL=http://hdl.handle.net/10079/yuldb/yuldb1801)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
